name: crm-whatsapp
description: CRM integrado com WhatsApp Cloud API

scripts.db:migrate: docker-compose exec api npm run prisma:migrate
scripts.db:seed: docker-compose exec api npm run prisma:seed
scripts.db:reset: docker-compose exec api npm run prisma:migrate:reset
scripts.test: docker-compose exec api npm run test
scripts.test:e2e: docker-compose exec api npm run test:e2e
scripts.lint: docker-compose exec api npm run lint && docker-compose exec web npm run lint
scripts.format: docker-compose exec api npm run format && docker-compose exec web npm run format
scripts.setup: docker-compose up -d && sleep 10 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed

author: CRM WhatsApp Team
